description: Composition Green round neck striped sweater made of 80% acrylic and 20% wool, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hem with the brand badge Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Classic adidas style sweater for men. This sweater promises exemplary comfort with its luxe fabric. Smart enough to wear with a shirt. Wear this with a crisp shirt, denims, an understated belt and shoes from red tape. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
